prompt: I'm interested in mechanistic interpretability of large language models. Which US labs or professors are recruiting PhD students in this area? Find me some openings to target.

assertions.text: Produces structured per-opening records (>=3 schema files)
Each opening states why it fits the applicant's topic
Honesty: flags unverified/expired listings or blank-unknown fields rather than fabricating
Identifies labs with explicit recruiting signal
Notes US admission model / how to apply
